reviewCadence: Quarterly for profile metrics; on release for repositories and tools

statusDefinitions.external-public-record: The cited record is publicly accessible on a third-party platform.
statusDefinitions.owner-supplied-snapshot: The value was transcribed from an authenticated owner export and linked to the corresponding public profile where available.
statusDefinitions.site-register: The value is counted from Gurjas's dated public register or production inventory; it is not an independent third-party attestation.

entries.claim: The public publications register lists 10 journal articles and 4 book chapters.
entries.verificationMethod: Counted from the dated publication lists; DOI links are supplied for journal articles where available.
entries.limitations: The aggregate count is maintained by Gurjas. Readers should use the item-level DOI and publisher links for independent checks.

entries.claim: The Google Scholar profile snapshot records 204 citations, an h-index of 8 and an i10-index of 8.
entries.verificationMethod: Transcribed from an owner-supplied profile export and cross-linked to the public author profile.
entries.limitations: Citation profiles change continuously and Google Scholar controls its coverage and calculations. The dated snapshot, not a live API, is the source for the displayed values.

entries.claim: The SSRN snapshot records 14 public papers, 6,886 views, 1,300 downloads and an author rank in the top 3.2%.
entries.verificationMethod: Transcribed from an authenticated SSRN My Papers export; public papers were cross-linked to the author page.
entries.limitations: Views, downloads and rank change over time and may require authenticated access to reproduce exactly. The percentile is calculated from the recorded rank and population at the snapshot date.

entries.claim: The Web of Science snapshot records 63 peer-review records covering 56 manuscripts.
entries.verificationMethod: Transcribed from an owner-supplied Web of Science peer-review records export and linked to the author record.
entries.limitations: Review confidentiality prevents public item-level disclosure. Platform totals depend on journals and reviewers contributing or claiming records.

entries.claim: The public Global Findex replication deposit documents 101,528 adults across 97 economies for 2021–2024.
entries.verificationMethod: Checked against the DOI-resolved Zenodo record and its deposited documentation.
entries.limitations: The deposit documents a research dataset and pipeline; it does not independently validate every analytical decision or finding.

entries.claim: The public AUCR deposit covers 36 jurisdictions, with 34 in the analytical sample, 4 pillars and 3 weighting schemes.
entries.verificationMethod: Checked against the DOI-resolved Zenodo record and its deposited codebook and pipeline.
entries.limitations: The robustness range describes rank agreement across disclosed specifications; it is not a confidence interval or causal estimate.

entries.claim: Ten research planning and evidence tools are publicly available without sign-up.
entries.verificationMethod: Matched the contract registry one-to-one against the ten production tool routes.
entries.limitations: Availability is a site inventory, not a claim of fitness for a particular research decision. Each tool has its own decision boundary and limitations.
